evals.name: fresh-all-tasks
evals.expected_output: 從全新狀態實作所有任務：建立 formatCurrency 函式（T1）和匯出模組（T2），呼叫 bdd-unit-test 撰寫 BDD 測試並執行，03-tasks.md 所有任務標記為 [x] 或 [x][bdd]。

assertions.name: 建立 T1 實作檔（currency.js）
assertions.check: transcript shows creating or writing to currency.js implementing the formatCurrency function

assertions.name: 建立 T2 匯出檔（index.js）
assertions.check: transcript shows creating or writing to index.js exporting formatCurrency

assertions.name: 呼叫 bdd-unit-test skill
assertions.check: transcript shows calling bdd-unit-test skill via Skill tool after all tasks are marked [x]

assertions.name: T1 更新為 [x] 或 [x][bdd]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T1 checkbox is changed from [ ] to [x] or [x][bdd] after the run

assertions.name: T2 更新為 [x] 或 [x][bdd]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T2 checkbox is changed from [ ] to [x] or [x][bdd] after the run

evals.name: resume-partial
evals.expected_output: T1 已 [x] 直接跳過，從 T2 繼續實作（建立 index.js 匯出），呼叫 bdd-unit-test 並執行，03-tasks.md 所有任務最終為 [x] 或 [x][bdd]。

assertions.name: T1 被跳過不重複實作
assertions.check: transcript indicates T1 is already [x] and is skipped; no re-creation of currency.js from scratch

assertions.name: 從 T2 繼續實作
assertions.check: transcript shows T2 as the first (or only) task to execute in this run

assertions.name: 建立 T2 匯出檔（index.js）
assertions.check: transcript shows creating or writing index.js for the export

assertions.name: 呼叫 bdd-unit-test skill
assertions.check: transcript shows calling bdd-unit-test skill after T2 completion

assertions.name: T2 最終為 [x] 或 [x][bdd]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T2 is updated to [x] or [x][bdd] after the run

evals.name: skip-manual
evals.expected_output: T1 和 T2 正常實作，[manual] T_test 被跳過，apply 自行執行 BDD 測試步驟，T1 和 T2 更新為 [x][bdd]，T_test [manual] 標記保持原狀不被修改。

assertions.name: T1 和 T2 正常執行
assertions.check: transcript shows T1 and T2 both being implemented (currency.js and index.js created)

assertions.name: [manual] T_test 被跳過
assertions.check: transcript explicitly shows T_test is skipped or passed over because it has [manual] tag

assertions.name: 呼叫 bdd-unit-test（apply 自身的 BDD 步驟）
assertions.check: transcript shows apply calling bdd-unit-test skill as part of its own post-implementation BDD step

assertions.name: T1 和 T2 更新為 [x] 或 [x][bdd]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T1 and T2 are marked [x] or [x][bdd] after the run

assertions.name: T_test [manual] 標記保持不變
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T_test line still contains [manual] and is NOT marked [x]; the [manual] tag is preserved
